info.title: beatbox API
info.description: HTTP and MCP server surfaces for beatbox.

200.description: Issue a short-lived one-time browser adapter same-user capability

401.description: Missing auth or daemon auth is not configured

200.description: Fail-closed browser adapter contract and conformance profile discovery

400.description: Malformed, oversized, or non-JSON request body

422.description: Protocol, source, policy, or sync-limit rejection

409.description: Idempotency key reused with a different payload

422.description: Protocol, source, policy, or job-limit rejection

409.description: Job already finished and cannot be canceled

adapter_id.description:
Optional adapter identifier to bind the capability to. When present, the
registration preflight must use the same manifest adapter_id.

ttl_seconds.description:
Optional requested lifetime in seconds. When present, it must be between
1 and 300 seconds.

same_user_capability.description:
Secret one-time capability. Treat as bearer material; Beatbox stores only
a digest and never echoes it from registration responses.

evidence_field.description: Required evidence field path in BrowserAdapterCompletionReport.

label.description: Human-readable compatibility label retained for older manifest fields.

proof_id.description: Stable machine-readable proof name. Adapters must echo this in reports.

required_invariant.description: Runtime invariant Beatbox expects before trusting completion.

adapter_id.description: Must match the trusted adapter id chosen for launch.

Adapter identifier for the envelope. Runtime launch requests use the
trusted registered adapter id; conformance fixtures may carry a sample
id and still do not imply adapter registration, trust, or launchability.
Null in discovery templates before an adapter is selected.

request_id.description: Server-issued request identifier for adapter logs and completion proofs.

adapter_id.description: Stable adapter identifier; non-empty, at most 128 bytes, no surrounding whitespace.

completion_proofs.description: Required completion proof labels; entries must be non-empty without surrounding whitespace.

contract_version.description: Browser adapter contract version; non-empty with no surrounding whitespace.

guard_fields.description: Required guard_plan field names; entries must be non-empty without surrounding whitespace.

launch_endpoint.description: Optional HTTPS launch endpoint string. Only syntax and literal local/private hosts are checked.

same_user_capability.description:
Caller-supplied same-user capability for the future local user/session
that would own this adapter. Beatbox can bind only a live one-time
capability issued by its REST control plane, consumes it at most once,
and never echoes it in responses.

artifact_mode.description:
Artifact persistence posture requested for the session. Non-default
modes remain fail-closed until storage and sealing are implemented.

credential_mode.description:
Credential posture requested for the session. Non-default modes remain
fail-closed until a real browser substrate implements scoped handling.

target_origins.description:
Bare public HTTP(S) origins this browser session is allowed to target.
Entries must contain only scheme, host, and optional port. The runtime
rejects credentials, paths, queries, fragments, localhost, private/LAN
address space, link-local metadata ranges, and more than 16 entries.

adapter_handoff.description:
Adapter handoff metadata for future browser launchers. This is
fail-closed while launch_endpoint is null and launchable is false.

artifact_mode.description: Echo of the requested artifact persistence posture.

credential_mode.description: Echo of the requested credential posture.

guard_plan.description:
Structured guard posture a future browser adapter must enforce before
this admission request can become runnable. It is a plan, not a claim
that the current daemon enforces browser isolation.

intent_warnings.description:
Non-fatal intent issues that matter before any future runnable browser
session can be admitted.

target_origins.description: Echo of the validated target origins from the admission request.

allowed_origins.description: Validated public origins this browser session may target.

deny_private_networks.description:
Runtime must deny localhost, loopback, private, shared, link-local, and
metadata-address egress even after DNS resolution, redirects, and proxying.

cpu_time_ms.description:
CPU time in milliseconds, when the lane measures it separately from wall
time. The W0 wasm lane does not, so this is `None` there — use `fuel_used`
as the deterministic compute signal rather than treating wall time as CPU.
